problem: [BUG] _parse_native_tool_call drops Bedrock Converse API tool arguments — always passes empty dict. When using AWS Bedrock as the LLM provider with native function calling, all tool arguments are silently dropped. Every tool call receives an empty dict {} instead of the actual arguments, causing pydantic validation failures on any tool with required parameters. (npm config set registry is not working — it seems correct per old docs)
memory_hint: Use npmrc for registry config. The old syntax was removed.
failure_without_memory: Keeps using npm config set registry which is deprecated. Endless debugging.
